name: @tank/tank-package-publisher
description: Package lifecycle specialist for Tank directory publishing. Covers dry-run-first workflow, manifest validation (skills.json), version bumping (semver), permission auditing, .tankignore patterns, CI/CD pipelines, and error remediation. Sources: Tank CLI docs. Triggers: tank publish, publish skill, dry run, skills.json, version bump, manifest, package, release, Tank directory, publish error, version exists, tank login, tank info, tank verify.
